import numpy as np
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont

# Load original image
img_path = '/Users/mugen/Codebase/chart_derendering/data/chartmuseum/images/texas-droughts-region-h-reservoirs-1950-1959.png'
img = Image.open(img_path)

plot_left = 160

plot_width = plot_right - plot_left

# Extract plot region
plot_region = img_array[plot_top:plot_bottom, plot_left:plot_right, :]

r = plot_region[:,:,0].astype(float)
g = plot_region[:,:,1].astype(float)
b = plot_region[:,:,2].astype(float)

# Define color masks
dark_blue_mask = (b > 150) & (r < 120) & (g < 120)
red_mask = (r > 140) & (g < 120) & (b < 120)
yellow_green_mask = (g > 150) & (r > 120) & (b < 120)

# For each line, extract the full trajectory
def get_line_trajectory(mask):
    """Get y-coordinate for each x position"""
    trajectory = {}
    for x in range(mask.shape[1]):
        col = mask[:, x]
        if col.sum() > 0:
            y_positions = np.where(col)[0]
            y_val = np.median(y_positions)
            # Convert to percentage
            pct = 100 * (1 - y_val / plot_height)
            trajectory[x] = pct
    return trajectory

blue_traj = get_line_trajectory(dark_blue_mask)
red_traj = get_line_trajectory(red_mask)
yellow_green_traj = get_line_trajectory(yellow_green_mask)

# Find minimum values and when they occur
print("Detailed line analysis:")
print("="*70)

def analyze_trajectory(traj, name):
    if not traj:
        print(f"{name}: No data found")
        return None
    
    values = list(traj.values())
    positions = list(traj.keys())
    
    min_pct = min(values)
    min_idx = values.index(min_pct)
    min_x = positions[min_idx]
    min_year = 1950 + (min_x / plot_width) * 9
    
    # Check if it reaches near 0%
    reaches_zero = min_pct < 1.0
    reaches_near_zero = min_pct < 5.0
    
    print(f"\n{name}:")
    print(f"  Minimum percentage: {min_pct:.2f}%")
    print(f"  Year of minimum: {min_year:.3f} (approx {int(min_year)} + {(min_year % 1)*12:.1f} months)")
    print(f"  Data points: {len(traj)}")
    print(f"  Reaches 0%: {'YES' if reaches_zero else 'NO' if reaches_near_zero else '(No, gets to {:.1f}%)'.format(min_pct)}")
    
    return {
        'min_pct': min_pct,
        'min_year': min_year,
        'min_x': min_x,
        'reaches_zero': reaches_zero
    }

blue_stats = analyze_trajectory(blue_traj, "BLUE (Lake Houston)")
red_stats = analyze_trajectory(red_traj, "RED (Lake Conroe)")
yellow_green_stats = analyze_trajectory(yellow_green_traj, "YELLOW/GREEN (Lake Livingston)")

# Which reaches minimum first?
print("\n" + "="*70)

all_stats = [
    ("Lake Houston (Blue)", blue_stats),
    ("Lake Conroe (Red)", red_stats),
    ("Lake Livingston (Yellow/Green)", yellow_green_stats)
]

# Sort by year
all_stats_sorted = sorted(all_stats, key=lambda x: x[1]['min_year'])

for name, stats in all_stats_sorted:
    print(f"{stats['min_year']:.3f}: {name} reaches {stats['min_pct']:.2f}%")

print(f"\n*** FIRST TO REACH MINIMUM: {all_stats_sorted[0][0]} ***")

# Check if any actually reach 0%
print("\n" + "="*70)
print("Checking for actual 0% depletion:")

any_reaches_zero = any(stats[1]['reaches_zero'] for stats in all_stats)
if any_reaches_zero:
    for name, stats in all_stats:

            print(f"{name} REACHES 0%")

    print("None of the three reservoirs actually reach 0%")
    print("All maintain at least ~9% of capacity")
    print("\nPossible interpretation of question:")
    print("- 'Depleted' may mean 'reached lowest level' rather than 'reached exact 0%'")

# For each line, find when it reaches its minimum
def get_minimum_info(mask, name):
    """Get detailed info about when line reaches minimum"""
    x_positions = []
    pct_values = []
    
    for x in range(mask.shape[1]):
        col = mask[:, x]
        if col.sum() > 0:
            y_positions = np.where(col)[0]
            y_val = np.median(y_positions)
            pct = 100 * (1 - y_val / plot_height)
            x_positions.append(x)
            pct_values.append(pct)
    
    if not pct_values:
        return None
    
    # Find the minimum percentage
    min_pct = min(pct_values)
    min_idx = pct_values.index(min_pct)
    min_x = x_positions[min_idx]
    
    # Convert x position to year
    min_year = 1950 + (min_x / plot_width) * 9
    
    # Find when it first drops below certain thresholds
    thresholds = [20, 15, 10, 5, 1]
    
    print(f"\n{name}:")
    print(f"  Minimum reached: {min_pct:.2f}% at year {min_year:.3f}")
    print(f"  Years below certain thresholds:")
    
    for threshold in thresholds:
        first_below = None
        for i, (x, pct) in enumerate(zip(x_positions, pct_values)):
            if pct <= threshold:
                year = 1950 + (x / plot_width) * 9
                first_below = year
                break
        
        if first_below is not None:
            print(f"    Below {threshold:2d}%: {first_below:.3f}")
    
    # Check if reaches 0% or very close
    closest_to_zero = min(pct_values)
    if closest_to_zero < 1.0:
        print(f"  *** REACHES NEAR 0% ({closest_to_zero:.2f}%) ***")
    
    return {
        'min_pct': min_pct,
        'min_year': min_year,
        'min_x': min_x
    }

print("="*70)

yellow_info = get_minimum_info(yellow_green_mask, "Yellow/Green (Lake Livingston)")

print("FINAL RANKING BY YEAR OF MINIMUM")
